meta.title: Diana Furchtgott-Roth on the Unemployment Rate for Fox Business
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Employment Policy Diana Furchtgott-Roth joined Fox Business on June 4, 2010 to discuss the latest employment figures.
